ion_action.objective:
B01_CODEX_RUNNER_TIMEOUT_POLICY_002_LIVE_QUEUE_PROOF compact retry.

Prove the patched Codex queue timeout policy on a real queued workload path.
Confirm the next Codex run uses a normalized timeout >=900 and <=7200,
produces latest_return.md, includes WORKLOAD DIFF, and passes proof-gate intake.

Do not edit runtime code unless a blocking defect is found.
If blocked, return BLOCKED_NEEDS_PATCH.

Required sections:
CONTEXT PROOF
TEMPLATE ACTION PROOF
VALIDATION
RESULT
WORKLOAD DIFF
BLOCKERS
RECOMMENDED NEXT PACKET
